trace.raw: {"mcp_tool":"mcd_query","arguments":{"sql":"with yrs as (select row_index as year_row, c0 as year from multihiertt_table_rows where example_id='MHDEV-0001' and table_index=0 and c0 in ('2007','2006','2005')), grp as (select row_id, row_index, c0 as product, c4 as total_revenues_text, CAST(replace(replace(replace(c4,'$',''),',',''),'(','') AS REAL) as total_revenues from multihiertt_table_rows where example_id='MHDEV-0001' and table_index=0 and lower(c0)='group retirement products'), mapped as (select g.row_id, y.year, g.product, g.total_revenues_text, g.total_revenues from grp g join yrs y on y.year_row = (select max(year_row) from yrs where year_row < g.row_index)) select row_id, year, product, total_revenues_text, total_revenues from mapped order by total_revenues desc, year desc limit 1"}}

observation.stdout:
{
  "columns": [
    "kind",
    "id1",
    "text1",

  ],
  "rowCount": 112,
  "rows": [
    {
      "id1": "MHDEV-0002",
      "kind": "example",
      "text1": "What will Distribution fees reach in 2010 if it continues to grow at its current rate? (in millions)",
      "text2": null,
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p0",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "0",
      "text2": "The Company is required to establish a valuation allowance for any portion of the deferred tax assets that management believes will not be realized.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p1",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "1",
      "text2": "Included in deferred tax assets is a significant deferred tax asset relating to capital losses that have been recognized for financial statement purposes but not yet for tax return purposes.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p2",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "2",
      "text2": "Under current U. S.  federal income tax law, capital losses generally must be used against capital gain income within five years of the year in which the capital losses are recognized for tax purposes.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p3",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "3",
      "text2": "Significant judgment is required in determining if a valuation allowance should be established, and the amount of such allowance if required.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p4",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "4",
      "text2": "Factors used in making this determination include estimates relating to the performance of the business including the ability to generate capital gains.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p5",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "5",
      "text2": "Consideration is given to, among other things in making this determination, i) future taxable income exclusive of reversing temporary differences and carryforwards, ii) future reversals of existing taxable temporary differences, iii) taxable income in prior carryback years, and iv) tax planning strategies.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p6",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "6",
      "text2": "Based on analysis of the Company’s tax position, management believes it is more likely than not that the results of future operations and implementation of tax planning strategies will generate sufficient taxable income to enable the Company to utilize all of its deferred tax assets.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p7",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "7",
      "text2": "Accordingly, no valuation allowance for deferred tax assets has been established as of December 31, 2009 and 2008.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p8",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "8",
      "text2": "Included in the Company’s deferred income tax assets are tax benefits related to net operating loss carryforwards of $59 million which will expire beginning December 31, 2025 as well as tax credit carryforwards of $166 million which will expire beginning December 31, 2025.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p9",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "9",
      "text2": "A reconciliation of the beginning and ending amount of gross unrecognized tax benefits for 2009 is as follows:",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p10",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "10",
      "text2": "## Table 0 ##",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p11",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "11",
      "text2": "If recognized, approximately $81 million, $62 million and $84 million, net of federal tax benefits, of the unrecognized tax benefits as of December 31, 2009, 2008 and 2007, respectively, would affect the effective tax rate.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p12",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "12",
      "text2": "The Company recognizes interest and penalties related to unrecognized tax benefits as a component of the income tax provision.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p13",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "13",
      "text2": "The Company recognized $1 million in interest and penalties for the year ended December 31, 2009 and a net reduction of $25 million and $4 million in interest and penalties for the years ended December 31, 2008 and 2007, respectively.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p14",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "14",
      "text2": "At December 31, 2009 and 2008, the Company had a receivable of $12 million and $13 million, respectively, related to accrued interest and penalties.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p15",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "15",
      "text2": "It is reasonably possible that the total amounts of unrecognized tax benefits will change in the next 12 months.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p16",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "16",
      "text2": "However, there are a number of open audits and quantification of a range cannot be made at this time.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p17",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "17",
      "text2": "The Company or one or more of its subsidiaries files income tax returns in the U. S.  federal jurisdiction, and various states and foreign jurisdictions.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p18",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "18",
      "text2": "With few exceptions, the Company is no longer subject to U. S.  federal, state and local, or non-U.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p19",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "19",
      "text2": "S.  income tax examinations by tax authorities for years before 1997.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p20",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "20",
      "text2": "The Internal Revenue Service (‘‘IRS’’), as part of the overall examination of the American Express Company consolidated return, completed its field examination of the Company’s U. S.  income tax returns for 1997 through 2002 during 2008 and completed its field examination of 2003 through 2004 in the third quarter of 2009.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p21",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "21",
      "text2": "However, for federal income tax purposes these years continue to remain open as a consequence of certain issues under appeal.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p22",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "22",
      "text2": "In the fourth quarter of 2008, the IRS commenced an examination of the Company’s U. S.  income tax returns for 2005 through 2007, which is expected to be completed in 2010.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p23",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "23",
      "text2": "The Company’s or certain of its subsidiaries’ state income tax returns are currently under examination by various jurisdictions for years ranging from 1998 through 2006.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p24",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "24",
      "text2": "On September 25, 2007, the IRS issued Revenue Ruling 2007-61 in which it announced that it intends to issue regulations with respect to certain computational aspects of the Dividends Received Deduction (‘‘DRD’’) related to separate account assets held in connection with variable contracts of life insurance companies.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p25",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "25",
      "text2": "Revenue Ruling 2007-61 suspended a revenue ruling issued in August 2007 that purported to change accepted industry and IRS interpretations of the statutes governing these computational questions.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p26",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "26",
      "text2": "Any regulations that the",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p27",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "27",
      "text2": "The following table presents the changes in wrap account assets:",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p28",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "28",
      "text2": "## Table 1 ##",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p29",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "29",
      "text2": "Our wrap accounts had net inflows of $9.3 billion in 2009 compared to net inflows of $3.7 billion in 2008 and market appreciation of $12.8 billion in 2009 compared to market depreciation of $26.8 billion in 2008.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p30",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "30",
      "text2": "In 2008, we acquired $2.0 billion in wrap account assets attributable to our acquisition of H&R Block Financial Advisors, Inc.  We provide securities execution and clearing services for our retail and institutional clients through our registered broker-dealer subsidiaries.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p31",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "31",
      "text2": "As of December 31, 2009, we administered $95.1 billion in assets for clients, an increase of $19.6 billion compared to the prior year primarily due to market appreciation.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p32",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "32",
      "text2": "The following table presents the results of operations of our Advice & Wealth Management segment:",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p33",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "33",
      "text2": "## Table 2 ##",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p34",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "34",
      "text2": "Our Advice & Wealth Management segment pretax loss was $34 million in 2009 compared to pretax loss of $149 million in 2008.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p35",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "35",
      "text2": "Net revenues Net revenues were $3.2 billion for the year ended December 31, 2009 compared to $3.1 billion in the prior year, an increase of $106 million, or 3%, driven by an increase in net investment income as well as revenues resulting from our 2008 acquisitions and a decrease in banking and deposit interest expense, partially offset by decreases in management and financial advice fees and distribution fees.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p36",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "36",
      "text2": "Management and financial advice fees decreased $105 million, or 8%, to $1.2 billion for the year ended December 31, 2009, driven by a 22% decline in the daily average S&P 500 Index on a period-over-period basis, partially offset by net inflows.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p37",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "37",
      "text2": "Wrap account assets increased $22.1 billion, or 30%, compared to the prior year due to net inflows and market appreciation.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p38",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "38",
      "text2": "Financial planning fees were lower for the year ended December 31, 2009 compared to the prior year resulting from accelerated financial plan delivery standards in 2008.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p39",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "39",
      "text2": "Distribution fees decreased $179 million, or 9%, to $1.7 billion for the year ended December 31, 2009, primarily due to lower client activity levels and lower asset-based fees driven by lower equity markets, partially offset by revenues resulting from our 2008 acquisitions.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p40",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "40",
      "text2": "Liquidity and Capital Resources Overview We maintained substantial liquidity during 2009.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p41",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "41",
      "text2": "At December 31, 2009, we had $3.1 billion in cash and cash equivalents compared to $6.2 billion at December 31, 2008.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p42",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "42",
      "text2": "Excluding collateral received from derivative counterparties, cash and cash equivalents were $3.0 billion and $4.4 billion at December 31, 2009 and 2008, respectively.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p43",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "43",
      "text2": "We have additional liquidity available through an unsecured revolving credit facility for $750 million that expires in September 2010, which we anticipate re-establishing before expiration.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p44",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "44",
      "text2": "Under the terms of the underlying credit agreement, we can increase this facility to $1.0 billion.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p45",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "45",
      "text2": "Available borrowings under this facility are reduced by any outstanding letters of credit.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p46",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "46",
      "text2": "We have had no borrowings under this credit facility and had $2 million of outstanding letters of credit at December 31, 2009.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p47",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "47",
      "text2": "In June 2009, we issued $200 million of 7.75% senior notes due 2039 and $300 million of 7.30% senior notes due 2019 (collectively, ‘‘senior notes’’).",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p48",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "48",
      "text2": "In July 2009, we used a portion of the proceeds from the issuance of our senior notes to repurchase $450 million aggregate principal amount of our 5.35% senior notes due 2010 pursuant to a cash tender offer.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p49",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "49",
      "text2": "In addition, in June 2009, we received cash of $869 million from the issuance and sale of 36 million shares of our common stock.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p50",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "50",
      "text2": "In September 2009, we announced the all-cash acquisition of the long-term asset management business of Columbia Management, which is expected to close in the spring of 2010.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p51",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "51",
      "text2": "The total consideration to be paid will be between $900 million and $1.2 billion, which is expected to be funded through the use of cash on hand.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p52",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "52",
      "text2": "In 2009, our subsidiaries, Ameriprise Bank, FSB and RiverSource Life, became members of the Federal Home Loan Bank of Des Moines (‘‘FHLB of Des Moines’’), which provides these subsidiaries with access to collateralized borrowings.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p53",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "53",
      "text2": "As of December 31, 2009, we had no borrowings from the FHLB of Des Moines.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p54",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "54",
      "text2": "We believe cash flows from operating activities, available cash balances and our availability of revolver borrowings will be sufficient to fund our operating liquidity needs.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p55",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "55",
      "text2": "Various ratings organizations publish financial strength ratings, which measure an insurance company’s ability to meet contractholder and policyholder obligations, and credit ratings.",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p56",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "56",
      "text2": "The following table summarizes the ratings for Ameriprise Financial, Inc.  and certain of its insurance subsidiaries as of the date of this filing:",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p57",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "57",
      "text2": "## Table 3 ##",
      "text3": null,
      "text4": null,
      "text5": null
    },
    {
      "id1": "mhdev_0002_p58",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "text1": "58",
      "text2": "As of December 31, 2009, A. M.  Best Company, Inc. , Standard & Poor’s Ratings Services, Moody’s Investors Service and Fitch Ratings Ltd.  retained negative outlooks on Ameriprise Financial, Inc.  and RiverSource Life and the life insurance industry as a whole.",

trace.raw: {"mcp_tool":"mcd_query","arguments":{"sql":"with t as (select source_table_id, table_index, row_count, max_column_count from multihiertt_source_tables where example_id='MHDEV-0002'), r as (select row_id, source_table_id, table_index, row_index, c0, c1, c2, c3, c4, c5, c6, c7, c8, c9 from multihiertt_table_rows where example_id='MHDEV-0002') select 'table' as kind, source_table_id as id, cast(table_index as text) as a, cast(row_count as text) as b, cast(max_column_count as text) as c, null as d, null as e, null as f from t union all select 'row', row_id, source_table_id, cast(table_index as text), cast(row_index as text), coalesce(c0,''), coalesce(c1,''), coalesce(c2,'') from r order by kind, a, c, d limit 200"}}

      "id": "mhdev_0008_p0",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "nonperformance credit spread moves to a zero spread over the LIBOR swap curve, the reduction to net income would be approximately $71 million, net of DAC and DSIC amortization and income taxes, based on December 31, 2010 credit spreads.",
      "row_index": 0,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,

      "c4": null,

      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p1",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Liquidity and Capital Resources Overview We maintained substantial liquidity during the year ended December 31, 2010.",
      "row_index": 1,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p10",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Our subsidiaries, Ameriprise Bank, FSB and RiverSource Life, are members of the Federal Home Loan Bank (‘‘FHLB’’) of Des Moines, which provides these subsidiaries with access to collateralized borrowings.",
      "row_index": 10,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p11",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "As of December 31, 2010, we had no borrowings from the FHLB.",
      "row_index": 11,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p12",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "In 2010, we entered into repurchase agreements to reduce reinvestment risk from higher levels of expected annuity net cash flows.",
      "row_index": 12,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p13",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Repurchase agreements allow us to receive cash to reinvest in longer-duration assets, while paying back the short-term debt with cash flows generated by the fixed income portfolio.",
      "row_index": 13,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p14",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "The balance of repurchase agreements at December 31, 2010 was $397 million, which is collateralized with agency residential mortgage backed securities and corporate debt securities from our investment portfolio.",
      "row_index": 14,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p15",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "We believe cash flows from operating activities, available cash balances and our availability of revolver borrowings will be sufficient to fund our operating liquidity needs.",
      "row_index": 15,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p16",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Dividends from Subsidiaries Ameriprise Financial is primarily a parent holding company for the operations carried out by our wholly owned subsidiaries.",
      "row_index": 16,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p17",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Because of our holding company structure, our ability to meet our cash requirements, including the payment of dividends on our common stock, substantially depends upon the receipt of dividends or return of capital from our subsidiaries, particularly our life insurance subsidiary, RiverSource Life, our face-amount certificate subsidiary, Ameriprise Certificate Company (‘‘ACC’’), AMPF Holding Corporation, which is the parent company of our retail introducing broker-dealer subsidiary, Ameriprise Financial Services, Inc.  (‘‘AFSI’’) and our clearing broker-dealer subsidiary, American Enterprise Investment Services, Inc.  (‘‘AEIS’’), our Auto and Home insurance subsidiary, IDS Property Casualty Insurance Company (‘‘IDS Property Casualty’’), doing business as Ameriprise Auto & Home Insurance, our transfer agent subsidiary, Columbia Management Investment Services Corp. , our investment advisory company, Columbia Management Investment Advisers, LLC, and Threadneedle.",
      "row_index": 17,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p18",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "The payment of dividends by many of our subsidiaries is restricted and certain of our subsidiaries are subject to regulatory capital requirements.",
      "row_index": 18,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p19",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Actual capital and regulatory capital requirements as of December 31 for our wholly owned subsidiaries subject to regulatory capital requirements were as follows:",
      "row_index": 19,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p2",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "At December 31, 2010, we had $2.9 billion in cash and cash equivalents compared to $3.1 billion at December 31, 2009.",
      "row_index": 2,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p20",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "## Table 0 ##",
      "row_index": 20,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p21",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "# Amounts are less than $1 million.",
      "row_index": 21,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,

      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p22",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "(1) Actual capital is determined on a statutory basis.",
      "row_index": 22,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p23",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "(2) Regulatory capital requirement is based on the statutory risk-based filing",
      "row_index": 23,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p24",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "The Company believes that its unrecognized tax benefits could decrease by $10,273 within the next twelve months.",
      "row_index": 24,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p25",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "The Company has effectively settled all Federal income tax matters related to years prior to 2010.",
      "row_index": 25,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p26",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Various other state and foreign income tax returns are open to examination for various years.",
      "row_index": 26,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p27",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Belgian Tax Matter The Company believes that its unrecognized tax benefits could decrease by $10,273 within the next twelve months.",
      "row_index": 27,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,

      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p28",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "The Company has effectively settled all Federal income tax matters related to years prior to 2010.",
      "row_index": 28,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p29",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Various other state and foreign income tax returns are open to examination for various years.",
      "row_index": 29,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p3",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "We have additional liquidity available through an unsecured revolving credit facility for up to $500 million that we entered into on September 30, 2010 and which expires in September 2011.",
      "row_index": 3,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p30",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Belgian Tax Matter In January 2012, the Company received a €23,789 assessment from the Belgian tax authority related to its year ended December 31, 2008, asserting that the Company had understated its Belgian taxable income for that year.",
      "row_index": 30,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p31",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "The Company filed a formal protest in the first quarter of 2012 refuting the Belgian tax authority¡¯s position.",
      "row_index": 31,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p32",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "The Belgian tax authority set aside the assessment in the third quarter of 2012 and refunded all related deposits, including interest income of €1,583 earned on such deposits.",
      "row_index": 32,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p33",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "However, on October 23, 2012, the Belgian tax authority notified the Company of its intent to increase the Company¡¯s taxable income for the year ended December 31, 2008 under a revised theory.",
      "row_index": 33,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p34",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "On December 28, 2012, the Belgian tax authority issued assess\u0002ments for the years ended December 31, 2005 and December 31, 2009, in the amounts of €46,135 and €35,567, respectively, including penalties, but excluding interest.",
      "row_index": 34,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p35",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "The Company filed a formal protest during the first quarter of 2013 relating to the new assessments.",
      "row_index": 35,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p36",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "In September 2013, the Belgian tax authority denied the Company¡¯s protests, and the Company has brought these two years before the Court of First Appeal in Bruges.",
      "row_index": 36,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p37",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "In December 2013, the Belgian tax authority issued additional assessments related to the years ended December 31, 2006, 2007, and 2010, in the amounts of €38,817, €39,635, and €43,117, respectively, including penalties, but excluding interest.",
      "row_index": 37,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p38",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "The Company filed formal protests during the first quarter of 2014, refuting the Belgian tax authority¡¯s position for each of the years assessed.",
      "row_index": 38,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p39",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "In the quarter ended June 28, 2014, the Company received a formal assessment for the year ended December 31, 2008, totaling €30,131, against which the Company also submitted its formal protest.",
      "row_index": 39,
      "source_table_id": null,
      "table_index": null
    },
    {
      "c0": null,
      "c1": null,
      "c10": null,
      "c11": null,
      "c2": null,
      "c3": null,
      "c4": null,
      "c5": null,
      "c6": null,
      "c7": null,
      "c8": null,
      "c9": null,
      "id": "mhdev_0008_p4",
      "kind": "paragraph",
      "paragraph_text": "Under the terms of the underlying credit agreement, we can increase this facility to $750 million upon satisfaction of certain approval requirements.",
      "row_index": 4,
